news.headline: Southside Bancshares, Inc. announced Q3 financial results: net income $20.5M, EPS $0.68, ROE 10.13%, ROA 0.98%.
news.summary: Southside Bancshares, Inc. announced its financial results for the quarter ended September 30, 2024, with a net income of $20.5 million, marking an 11.2% increase from the same period in 2023. Earnings per diluted common share rose by 13.3% to $0.68. The annualized return on average shareholders’ equity for the quarter was 10.13%, up from 9.50% in 2023, while the annualized return on average assets was 0.98%, compared to 0.93% in 2023.

news.headline: NVIDIA's AI tech aids Indian enterprises in creating multilingual models, benefiting over a billion local language speakers like Hindi.
news.summary: NVIDIA's artificial intelligence technology is aiding Indian enterprises in creating multilingual models, which can benefit over a billion speakers of local languages, such as Hindi. This assistance aims to enhance accessibility for a significant number of individuals within India.

news.headline: Consumers adopting "slow shopping" trend for holiday spending per Affirm research; 73% prioritizing deliberate purchases this year.
news.summary: In San Francisco, a recent study by Affirm (NASDAQ: AFRM) showed that consumers are actively participating in holiday spending this year. Although they are not hesitating to make purchases, they are approaching their buying decisions more thoughtfully. The research conducted by Talker Research for Affirm highlights the rise of "slow shopping," with a significant 73% of consumers embracing this method. This trend indicates a shift towards more deliberate and mindful shopping habits during the holiday season.

Stone expressed satisfaction with the results, highlighting the company's solid performance during this period. The team achieved revenue growth and margin expansion, showcasing the strength of Allegion's business model. As the company looks ahead to the end of 2024, they are maintaining their focus on continued success.

news.headline: White House invests in Intel for chip manufacturing revival but faces setbacks as company lays off workers and delays factories.
news.summary: The revival of U.S. chip manufacturing hinges in part on a company that is cutting jobs and delaying the construction of factories, contradicting the government's push for increased production.

news.headline: Boeing must resolve machinists strike quickly for 100% production efficiency.
Denmark proposes to tax unrealized crypto gains similar to stocks and bonds. Report suggests all crypto assets be taxed under uniform rules, using "inventory taxation" method.
news.summary: Denmark's Tax Law Council has proposed implementing taxes on unrealized gains and losses from cryptocurrency assets, mirroring taxation on traditional stocks and bonds. The 93-page report suggests a uniform tax approach for all cryptocurrency assets, treating them as part of a single portfolio subject to annual taxation. This model, known as "inventory taxation," would tax the entire portfolio by a set date each year regardless of asset sale status. In this method, cryptocurrencies would be taxed similarly to other financial assets such as stocks and bonds.

news.headline: Economist Peter Schiff warns investors against keeping $20K in cash due to purchasing power erosion amidst inflation concerns.
news.summary: Economist Peter Schiff recently advised investors to avoid holding cash for the long term due to the risk of significant loss in purchasing power caused by inflation concerns. The warning came during a conversation with an individual considering investing their $20,000 savings, where Schiff stated that cash investments are among the riskiest choices as they result in a decline in purchasing power over time. This caution was part of a larger discussion regarding U.S. Treasury yields and monetary policies, with Schiff highlighting the current 10-year Treasury yield at 4.25% and predicting even higher yields in the future due to the increasing national debt and expanding budget deficits. Schiff, a renowned critic of Bitcoin, expressed skepticism about the value of cash investments in light of these economic factors.

news.headline: NVIDIA teams up with top Indian IT firms (Infosys, TCS, Tech Mahindra, Wipro) to boost AI adoption, generating jobs and training devs in India.
news.summary: In a strategic move, NVIDIA has partnered with leading Indian tech giants Infosys, TCS, Tech Mahindra, and Wipro to boost the implementation of AI in India. This collaboration aims to drive AI adoption in the country, creating numerous job opportunities and offering specialized training programs for developers gearing up for the AI revolution. By joining forces with these key players, NVIDIA is set to significantly impact the AI landscape in India, leveraging the expertise and resources of these established firms to propel the growth and innovation of AI technology.

news.headline: Nobel economist Daron Acemoglu endorses Kamala Harris for presidency with 22 others, praising her economic policies.
news.summary: Nobel Prize-winning economist Daron Acemoglu, along with 22 other Nobel laureates, formally endorsed Kamala Harris for the U.S. presidency. The endorsement was made public on Thursday, underscoring their confidence in Harris’s economic strategies. Acemoglu announced this development on X, stressing the unified backing for Harris’s economic proposals. More than half of the living U.S. Nobel Prize laureates in economics have signed a letter praising Harris’s economic agenda, labeling it as far superior to that of former President Donald Trump. They believe Harris’s policies will drive robust and fair economic growth, benefiting aspects such as health, investment, and sustainability. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Harris and Trump strive to influence undecided voters.

The event was led by Adam Medros, CEO of Spark Networks, and Tobias Plaputta, CTO of Spark Networks, along with Sanjay Salunkhe. The expansion signifies a significant milestone for Hexaware, marking its continued growth and presence in the European market. This move adds to the company's global presence and further solidifies its position as a key player in the technology industry.

news.headline: Swiss agency invests $3M in LatticeFlow AI to develop AI governance platform, selected from 373 applicants.

This financial support aims to propel their groundbreaking AI Assessments platform.
